width.description: VIEWPORT design width in pixels (the browser frame, NOT the world). 16:9 so Scale.FIT is full-bleed (no letterbox bars) on a standard 16:9 monitor. The WORLD a level occupies is BaseLevelScene.mapWidth/mapHeight, which may be WIDER than the viewport (an N-screen scrolling level) — the camera follows the player so the viewport stays full at every scroll position; for a single-screen level mapWidth == this viewport width.

height.description: Game design height in pixels. 16:9 (1280x720) — see width.
